     C                   UPDATE    HS1210S1
     C     ZL1           CHAIN     HS1210S2                           81
     C  N81              UPDATE    HS1210S2
     C                   ELSE
     C                   UPDATE    HS1210S2
     C     ZL2           CHAIN     HS1210S1                           81
     C  N81              UPDATE    HS1210S1
     C                   ENDIF
     C                   SETOFF                                       7093
     C*--------------------
     C     F112          IFEQ      AN2
     C                   READC     HS1210S1                               80
     C                   ELSE
     C                   READC     HS1210S2                               80
     C                   ENDIF
     C                   ENDDO
     C*
     C                   ENDSR
     C**************************************************************************
     C* PR�FEN OB ABGELEHNTER CLAIM EXISTIERT, WENN DANN ROT ANZEIGEN
     C**************************************************************************
     C     SR_FARBE      BEGSR
     C*
     C                   EVAL      *IN41 = *OFF
     C                   EVAL      *IN42 = *OFF
     C                   EVAL      *IN43 = *OFF
     C                   EVAL      SUBANZ = 0
     C*
     C                   IF        SUB160 <> '00000000'
     C*------------------
     C                   Eval      G71000 = SUB000
     C                   Eval      G71050 = SUB050
     C     KEYG73LF1     CHAIN(N)  HSG73LF1                           81
     C                   IF        Not %Found() AND SUB170 = '20'
     C                   SETON                                        41
     C                   ENDIF
     C*
     C     *IN81         DOWEQ     '0'
     C*---
     C*Rot bei Fehler
     C                   IF        G73290 = 16
     C                   Eval      *In41 = *On
     C                   EndIf
     C                   IF        G73290 = 30 OR G73290 = 0 AND
     C                             SUB160 <> *BLANKS OR SUB160 = *BLANKS AND
     C                             SUB170 = '20'
     C                   Eval      *In41 = *On
     C                   EndIf
     C                   If        CwpActive And
     C                             G73290 > 3 And G73290 <> 11 And
     C                             isWarrScope(G73140) And G71190 <> *Blanks
     C                   If        getClaimValues('Compensated':G73000:G73050:
     C                                  G73060:G73065) = 0
     C                   Eval      *In41 = *On
     C                   EndIf
     C                   EndIf
     C*Gelb bei Ablehnung
     C                   IF        G73290 = 11
     C                   Eval      *In42 = *On
     C                   EndIf
     C                   If        *IN45
     C                   If        G73290  > 2 And Not *In41
     C*------------------
     C                   If        isWarrScope(G73140) And CwpActive And
     C                             G71190 <> *Blanks
     C*---
     C                   If        G73420 <> '61'
     C                   Eval      *IN42 = *ON
     C                   Else
     C                   If        getClaimValues('Requested':G73000:G73050:
     C                                            G73060:G73065) <>
     C                             getClaimValues('Compensated':G73000:G73050:
     C                                            G73060:G73065)
     C                   EVAL      *IN42 = *ON
     C                   ENDIF
     C                   ENDIF
     C*---
     C                   Else
     C*---
     C                   MOVE      G71160        CLAIMNO
     C                   MOVE      G73340        FAILNO
     C     KEY_009       CHAIN     S3F009
     C                   IF        %FOUND(S3F009)
     C                   IF        OCLMII <> '11' AND OCLMII <> '21' AND
     C                             OCLMII <> '16' AND OCLMII <> '  ' AND
     C                             OCLMII <> '26' AND OCLMII <> '27'
     C                   EVAL      *IN42 = *ON
     C                   ENDIF
     C                   ELSE
     C                   EVAL      *IN42 = *ON
     C                   ENDIF
     C*---
     C                   EndIf
     C*------------------
     C                   ENDIF
     C                   ENDIF
     C*Blau bei Warten auf manuelle Bearbeitung
     C                   IF        G73290  = 3 or G73290 = 11
     C                   Eval      *In43 = *On
     C                   EndIf
     C*Anzahl Fehler
     C                   EVAL      SUBANZ += 1
     C*---
     C     KEYG73LF1     ReadE(N)  HSG73LF1                               81
     C                   ENDDO
     C*------------------
     C                   ELSE
     C                   EVAL      SUB160 = *BLANKS
     C                   ENDIF
     C*
     C                   Eval      SUBCOL = *Blanks
     C                   If        *In41
     C                   Eval      %Subst(SUBCOL:1:3) = 'ROT'
     C                   EndIf
     C                   If        *In42
     C                   Eval      %Subst(SUBCOL:6:4) = 'GELB'
     C                   EndIf
     C                   If        *In43
     C                   Eval      %Subst(SUBCOL:6:4) = 'BLAU'
     C                   EndIf
     C*
     C                   ENDSR
     C**************************************************************************
     C*Minimumantrag ausbuchen
     C**************************************************************************
     C     SR_MINIMUM    BEGSR
     C*
     C     KEYMIN        CHAIN     HSG71LF2
     C                   IF        %FOUND(HSG71LF2)
     C*--------------------
     C                   IF        G71170 = 5
     C                   EXFMT     HS1210WM
     C                   IF        NOT *IN12
     C*---
     C                   EVAL      G71170 = 20
     C                   UPDATE    HSG71LR2
     C                   IF        AXAPTA = '0'
     C                   CALL      'HS1219M'
     C                   PARM                    AKTION
     C                   PARM                    G71050
     C                   ELSE
      *Feststellen AXAPTA-Company und Niederlassungsnummer
     C                   eval      Kzl9000 = G71000
     C                   eval      Branch9000 = *blanks
     C                   eval      Comp9000 = *blanks
     C                   eval      Vbranch9000 = *blanks
     C                   eval      Date9000 = *blanks
     c                   exsr      AxBranchSR
     c                   if        Comp9000 <> *blanks
     C                   eval      Company = Comp9000
     C                   eval      Branch = Branch9000
     C                   eval      Verantw = VBranch9000
     C                   eval      %subst(Sonstiges:1:3) = G71000
     C                   eval      %subst(Sonstiges:4:8) = G71050
     C                   CALL      'AX9999C'
     C                   PARM                    Pgm
     C                   PARM                    Company
     C                   PARM                    Verantw
     C                   PARM                    Branch
     C                   PARM                    BuDatum
     C                   PARM                    BuchOk
     C                   PARM                    Sonstiges
     C                   endif                                                  Comp9000<>blanks
     C                   ENDIF
     C*---
     C                   ENDIF
     C                   ENDIF
     C*--------------------
     C                   ENDIF
     C*
     C                   ENDSR
     C**************************************************************************
     C*Freigabe Einreichungsfrist beantragen
     C**************************************************************************
     C     SR_G70        BEGSR
     C*
     C                   MONITOR
     C                   EVAL      RDAT  = %DATE(NEU2X:*EUR)
     C                   EVAL      RDAT8 = %CHAR(RDAT:*ISO0)
     C                   ON-ERROR
     C                   EVAL      RDAT8 = *BLANKS
     C                   ENDMON
     C*
     C                   IF        RDAT8 <> *BLANKS AND NEU1 <> *BLANKS
     C     KEY_G70R      CHAIN(N)  HSG70R
     C                   IF        NOT %FOUND(HSG70F)
     C*--------------------
     C                   EVAL      G70_KZL  = PKZ
     C                   EVAL      G70_RNR  = NEU1
     C                   EVAL      G70_RDAT = RDAT8
     C                   EVAL      G70_FGNR = *BLANKS
     C                   EVAL      G70_DAT  = *BLANKS
     C     KEY_G70R      CHAIN(N)  HSAHKPF
     C                   IF        %FOUND(HSAHKPF)
     C                   EVAL      G70_FGNR = AHK510
     C                   EVAL      G70_DAT  = AHK620
     C                   ENDIF
     C                   EVAL      G70_STATUS = *BLANKS
     C                   WRITE     HSG70R
     C                   EXFMT     HS1210W62
     C*--------------------
     C                   ENDIF
     C                   ENDIF
     C*
     C                   ENDSR
     C**************************************************************************
     C*Demand Code ermitteln
     C**************************************************************************
     C     SR_DMC        BEGSR
     C*
     C                   EVAL      SUBDMC = *BLANKS
     C     KEYG73        CHAIN(N)  HSG73PF
     C                   IF        %FOUND(HSG73PF)
     C*--------------------
     C                   EVAL      SUBDMC = G73140
     C*--------------------
     C                   ENDIF
     C*
     C                   ENDSR
     C**************************************************************************
     C*Filter Art
     C**************************************************************************
     C     SR_FILART     BEGSR
     C*
     C                   EVAL      GEFUNDEN = 'N'
     C*
     C     KEYG73        SETLL     HSG73PF
     C     KEYG73        READE(N)  HSG73PF
     C                   DOW       NOT %EOF(HSG73PF) AND GEFUNDEN = 'N'
     C*--------------------
     C                   SELECT
     C*Kulanz
     C                   WHEN      FILART = 'K'
     C     G73140        CHAIN     S3F085
     C                   IF        %FOUND(S3F085) AND DECTWF = 2
     C                   EVAL      GEFUNDEN = 'J'
     C                   ENDIF
     C*Garantie
     C                   WHEN      FILART = 'G'
     C                   IF        isWarrScope(G73140)
     C                   EVAL      GEFUNDEN = 'J'
     C                   ENDIF
     C*alle Anderen
     C                   OTHER
     C                   If        FILART = %SUBST(GetScope(G73140):1:1)
     C                   Eval      GEFUNDEN = 'J'
     C                   EndIf
     C*
     C                   ENDSL
     C*--------------------
     C     KEYG73        READE(N)  HSG73PF
     C                   ENDDO
     C*
     C                   IF        GEFUNDEN = 'N'
     C                   EVAL      G71170 = 99
     C                   ENDIF
     C*
     C                   ENDSR
     C**************************************************************************
     C*Axapta-Branch
     C**************************************************************************
     c     AxBranchSR    begsr
     c                   call      'AX9000'
     c                   parm                    Kzl9000
     c                   parm                    Branch9000
     c                   parm                    Comp9000
     c                   parm                    VBranch9000
     c                   parm                    Date9000
     c                   parm                    Days9000
     c     AxBranchSREn  endsr
     D*****************************************************************
     P CreateClaim     B
     D CreateClaim     PI
     D*----------------------------------------------------------------
     D create          S               N   Inz(*Off)
     D maintenance     S               N   Inz(*Off)
     D groups          S              4A   Inz(*Blanks)
     D partNo          S              7A   Inz(*Blanks)
     D partValue       S             11  2 Inz(0)
     D text            S             65A   Dim(4) Inz(*Blanks)
     D failureNo       S              2  0 Inz(0)
     D lineNo          S              1  0 Inz(0)
     D valueMat        S             11  2 Inz(0)
     D valueLab        S             11  2 Inz(0)
     D valueSpe        S             11  2 Inz(0)
     D*****************************************************************
      /free
        FailureNo = 1;
        SetLl Key_GPS HSGPSLF3;
        ReadE Key_GPS HSGPSLF3;
        DoW Not %Eof(HSGPSLF3);
           If GPS150 > failureNo;
              createFail(failureNo:groups:partNo:maintenance:text:
                         valueMat:valueLab:valueSpe);
              FailureNo = GPS150;
              Maintenance = *Off;
              clear text;
              lineNo = 0;
              valueMat = 0;
              valueLab = 0;
              valueSpe = 0;
              groups = *Blanks;
              partNo = *Blanks;
              partValue = 0;
           EndIf;
           If GPS150 > 0;
              create = *On;
              GPS020 = %Subst(%EditC(GPS150:'X'):2:2);
              GPS025 = '00';
              //Check if Maintenance Standard time
              If GPS040 = 'MAT';
                 Chain GPS050 ITLSMF3;
                 If %Found(ITLSMF3) And SFRAN = 'SC';
                    If GPS070 > partValue;
                       partNo = GPS050;
                       partValue = GPS070;
                    EndIf;
                 EndIf;
              EndIf;
              Exec SQL Set :GPS080U = Upper(:GPS080);
              If GPS040 = 'ARB' And %Scan('WARTUNG':GPS080U) > 0;
                 Maintenance = *On;
                 groups = %Subst(GPS050:1:4);
              EndIf;
              //Retrieve Main and Subgroup
              If GPS040 = 'ARB' And Groups = *Blanks;
                 groups = %Subst(GPS050:1:4);
              EndIf;
              If GPS040 = 'TXT' And %Subst(GPS080:1:1) <> '+' and lineNo < 4;
                 lineNo +=1;
                 text(lineNo) = GPS080;
              EndIf;
              Select;
              When GPS040 = 'ARB';
                 valueLab += GPS060 * GPS070;
              When GPS040 = 'MAT';
                 valueMat += GPS060 * GPS070;
              When GPS040 = 'TXT';
              Other;
                 valueSpe += GPS070;
              EndSl;
           EndIf;
           ReadE Key_GPS HSGPSLF3;
        EndDo;
        If create;
           createFail(failureNo:groups:partNo:maintenance:text:
                      valueMat:valueLab:valueSpe);
           Chain (G71000:G71050:G71060) HSG71LF2;
           If %Found(HSG71LF2);
              G71170 = 3;
              Update HSG71LR2;
           EndIf;
           If PKZ = 'SNF';
              //sendClaim(G71000:G71050:*Blanks:*Blanks);
           EndIf;
        EndIf;
        Unlock HSG71PF;
        Unlock HSG73PF;
       Return;
      /end-free
     P                 E
     D*****************************************************************
     P CreateFail      B
     D CreateFail      PI
     D   Failure                      2  0 value
     D   Groups                       4A   value
     D   PartNo                       7A   value
     D   Maintenance                  1N   value
     D   Text                        65A   Dim(4) value
     D   valueMat                    11  2 value
     D   valueLab                    11  2 value
     D   valueSpe                    11  2 value
     D*----------------------------------------------------------------
     D*****************************************************************
      /free
        Clear HSG73PR;
        G73000 = G71000;
        G73010 = G71010;
        G73020 = G71020;
        G73030 = G71030;
        G73040 = G71040;
        G73050 = G71050;
        G73060 = %EditC(Failure:'X');
        If partNo = *Blanks;
           G73070 = G79_SVT;
        Else;
           G73070 = partNo;
        EndIf;
        If %Subst(Groups:1:2) = *Blanks;
           G73080 = '00';
        Else;
           G73080 = %Subst(Groups:1:2);
        EndIf;
        If %Subst(Groups:3:2) = *Blanks;
           G73090 = '00';
        Else;
           G73090 = %Subst(Groups:3:2);
        EndIf;
        G73100 = G79_SC;
        G73120 = Text(1);
        G73130 = Text(2);
        G73140 = G79_DC;
        If Maintenance;
           %Subst(G73140:1:1) = 'W';
        EndIf;
        If BTS060 = 'SAT' And %Subst(G73140:2:1) = '2';
           %Subst(G73140:2:1) = '8';
        EndIf;
        Chain G73140 S3f085;
        If %Found(S3f085);
           G73180 = DMCPWF;
           G73190 = DLCPWF;
           G73200 = DSCPWF;
        EndIf;
        G73210 = valueMat;
        G73220 = valueLab;
        G73230 = valueSpe;
        G73240 = 1;
        G73290 = 0;
        G73320 = Text(3);
        G73330 = Text(4);
        G73340 = G73060;
        //Freigabe-Nr. ermitteln
        If %SUBST(GetScope(G73140):1:1) = 'R';
           SetLl (G71000:G71030 + G71040) RWAPRL1;
           ReadE (G71000:G71030 + G71040) RWAPRL1;
           DoW Not %Eof(RWAPRL1);
              If APR_NR <> *Blanks And G71060 = APR_FGNR;
                 %SUBST(G73330:47:14) = APR_NR;
              EndIf;
              ReadE (G71000:G71030 + G71040) RWAPRL1;
           EndDo;
        EndIf;
        Write(E) HSG73PR;
        Auto = 'J';
        CallHS1217(G71000:G71010:G71020:G71030:G71040:G71050:G73060:
                   Aktion:Auto);
        Return;
      /end-free
     P                 E
     D*****************************************************************
     P CheckClaim      B
     D CheckClaim      PI              N
     D*----------------------------------------------------------------
     D counter         S              1  0 Inz(0)
     D error           S               N   Inz(*Off)
     D*****************************************************************
      /free
       errorT = *Blanks;
       If %Trim(G73360) = '3' And G73280 = *Blanks;
          counter += 1;
          %Subst(errorT:(counter - 1) * 70 + 1:70) = 'Ursache Kampagne aber ' +
                 'keine Kampagnen-Nr. eingetragen.';
          G73360 = *Blanks;
          Update HSG73LR1;
       EndIf;
       If G73360 = *Blanks;
          counter += 1;
          %Subst(errorT:(counter - 1) * 70 + 1:70) = 'Schadenscodierung Kund' +
                 'e ung�ltig.';
       EndIf;
       If %Trim(G73360) = '3' And (G73370 <> *Blanks Or G73380 <> *Blanks);
          counter += 1;
          %Subst(errorT:(counter - 1) * 70 + 1:70) = 'Schadenscodierung Kund' +
                 'e ung�ltig.';
       EndIf;
       If G73390 = *Blanks;
          counter += 1;
          %Subst(errorT:(counter - 1) * 70 + 1:70) = 'Schadenscodierung Werk' +
                 'statt ung�ltig.';
       EndIf;
       If %Trim(G73390) = '97' And (G73400 <> *Blanks Or G73410 <> *Blanks);
          counter += 1;
          %Subst(errorT:(counter - 1) * 70 + 1:70) = 'Schadenscodierung Werk' +
                 'statt ung�ltig.';
       EndIf;
       If G73070 = *Blanks;
          counter += 1;
          %Subst(errort:(counter - 1) * 70 + 1:70) = 'Es ist keine schadens'+
                 'verursachende Teilenummer angegeben.';
       EndIf;
       SetlL (G73000:G73050:G73060) HSGPSPF;
       ReadE(N) (G73000:G73050:G73060) HSGPSPF;
       Dow Not %Eof(HSGPSPF) And Not error;
          If GPS040 = 'SMA' And (GPS220 = *Blanks Or GPS240 = *Blanks);
             error = *On;
          EndIf;
          ReadE(N) (G73000:G73050:G73060) HSGPSPF;
       EndDo;
       If error;
          counter += 1;
          %Subst(errorT:counter * 1:60) = 'Es sind Sonderkosten '+
                 'ohne Codierung vorhanden.';
       EndIf;
       If getClaimValues('Requested':G73000:G73050:G73060:G73065) = 0;
          counter += 1;
          %Subst(errorT:counter * 1:60) = 'Antrag mit Wert 0 kan'+
                 'n nicht versendet werden.';
       EndIf;

       If counter > 0 And errorT <> *Blanks;
          ExFmt HS1210WE;
          Return *Off;
       EndIf;
       Return *On;
      /end-free
     P                 E
     D*****************************************************************
     P CheckV4         B
     D CheckV4         PI              N
     D*****************************************************************
RM#8   Monitor;
RM#8      If %Subst(G71200:8:2) = 'V4';
             Return *Off;
          EndIf;
RM#8      Chain (G71000:G71010:G71020:' ':
RM#8             G71030:G71040:G71190:%Subst(G71200:8:2)) HSAHKPF;
RM#8      If %Found(HSAHKPF);
RM#8         SetLl (AHK000:AHK040:AHK050:AHK060:'V4') HSEPAF;
RM#8         ReadE (AHK000:AHK040:AHK050:AHK060:'V4') HSEPAF;
RM#8         DoW Not %EoF(HSEPAF);
RM#8            If EPA_DATV = AHK080;
RM#8               return *On;
RM#8            EndIf;
RM#8            ReadE (AHK000:AHK040:AHK050:AHK060:'V4') HSEPAF;
RM#8         EndDo;
RM#8      EndIf;
RM#8   On-Error *All;
RM#8
RM#8   EndMon;
       Return *Off;
     P                 E
     D*****************************************************************
     P AddAttachments  B
     D AddAttachments  PI
     D   id                           9  0 value
     D   dealerId                     3A   value
     D   claimNo                      8A   value
     D   failNo                       2A   value
     D*----------------------------------------------------------------
     D sid             S              9  0 Inz(0)
     D*****************************************************************
       exec sql select wkt_sid into :sid from hswktf
                where wkt_id = :id;
        If SQLCOD = 0 and sid > 0;
          exec sql
             INSERT INTO HSG75F (G75_KZL, G75_C00001, G75_FAILNO,
             G75_FILE, G75_F00001)
             SELECT :dealerid, :claimNo, :failNo, ATT_BLOB,
             ATT_NAME FROM cdattf WHERE att_dmg_id = :sid;
        EndIf;
        Return;
     P                 E
     D*****************************************************************
     P reNumberPos     B
     D reNumberPos     PI
     D   dealerId                     3A   value
     D   claimNo                      8A   value
     D*****************************************************************
       DCL-DS Claims qualified;
              List Char(512) Pos(1);
              Record Dim(999) Pos(1);
                     lineNo zoned(3) overlay(Record: 1);
                     pos zoned(3) overlay(Record: *next);
       END-DS Claims;

       DCL-S x uns(5) inz(1);
       DCL-S posN uns(3) inz(0);
       DCL-S posW uns(3) inz(1);
       DCL-S line uns(3) inz(1);

       exec sql
                select listagg(digits(GPS030) concat
                               digits(GPS150))
                within group(order by GPS150) as List
                into :Claims.List
                from HSGPSPF
                where GPS000 = :dealerId and GPS010 = :claimNo;

       Dow Claims.Record(x) <> *Blanks;
           line = Claims.LineNo(x);
           If x = 1 Or Claims.Pos(x) <> posW;
              posW = Claims.Pos(x);
              posN += 1;
           EndIf;
           exec sql
                update HSGPSPF set GPS150 = :posN
                where GPS000 = :dealerId and GPS010 = :claimNo and
                      GPS030 = :line;
           x += 1;
       EnDDo;
     P                 E
